assumptions: The issue concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9.
The intragroup dividends have been recognised as an intragroup receivable, ie a recognised monetary item.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and components of such items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a distinct hedge accounting model for variability in cash flows of recognised items or highly probable forecast transactions, including qualifying intragroup foreign currency exposures.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify net investment hedge as a separate hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk arising from net investments in foreign operations.
